name: com.ireshsampath.unity-assets.easy-tangible-table
description:
EasyTangibleTable is a lightweight Unity asset for building interactive tangible table applications using TUIO. Easily detect, track, and manage fiducial markers (tags) to create interactive surfaces, installations, and multi-object experiences.

Note: Requires a TUIO source (such as reacTIVision, Displax, or other tracking systems) to send tag data over OSC.

samples.description: A sample scene demonstrating how to receive TUIO tag data and interact with tangible objects using EasyTangibleTable.
